strategic_objective: Characterize the nature and implications of near-constant backward bulk traffic features
key_checks: measure exact unique value counts and cardinality ratios for backward bulk features
compare backward bulk feature distributions across time slices and traffic segments
assess potential preprocessing or collection steps that could induce uniformity
investigate subtle intra-class variations within backward bulk features
success_criteria: identification of bounded variability patterns consistent with genuine network behavior or data constraints
detection of any meaningful sub-patterns or deviations within the uniform backward bulk features
evidence that uniformity does not obscure relevant attack-related signals
router_constraints: preserve evidence references e23 to e28
